title: geranium spurium
intro: Geranium spurium, also known as the Wood Geranium or Spur Geranium, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its small pink, white, or purple flowers. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Geranium spurium include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate menstrual cramps, making it a popular remedy for women's health issues. Herbal preparations of Geranium spurium include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
